description:
A GPU-accelerated terminal emulator

Nova is a fast, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator built with Rust and iced.
0.18.3 (2026-05-12)
Bug Fixes
- chain PROMPT_COMMAND instead of overwriting, drop --norc for zoxide compat (5da0801)
- ui: skip newlines for wrapped lines in selection copy (a09ebed)
